data.title: Crimson Cup celebrates 21 coffee shops in 14 states with long-term success thanks to their consulting program.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on July 17, 2025, Crimson Cup Coffee & Tea is honoring the anniversaries of 21 independent coffee shops located in 14 states this month. These local businesses, backed by the coffee roaster's 7 Steps to Success consulting program, are celebrating...

data.title: Instacart (NASDAQ: CART) to reveal Q2 2025 financials on Aug 7, 2025 after market close. Shareholder letter to be released.
data.description: Instacart (NASDAQ: CART) has divulged that it is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, August 7, 2025. Shareholders and interested parties can access the company's quarterly shareholder letter on Instacart's Investor platform. This update was shared on July 17, 2025, in San Francisco.

data.title: Instacart's CEO to speak at Goldman Sachs conference, Chris Rogers to become CEO on August 15.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Instacart disclosed that Chris Rogers, the present Chief Business Officer set to become the new CEO on August 15, will engage in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs Communacopia & Technology Conference on Wednesday. Instacart is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CART.

data.title: Epirus wins $43.5M contract from US Army for IFPC-HPM Generation II Systems, boosting range, power, lethality, and usability.
data.description: Epirus introduces the next iteration of its energy-based high-power microwave platform, showcasing enhancements in range, power, lethality, and usability. On July 17, 2025, the company disclosed securing a substantial contract worth $43,551,060 from the U.S. Army's Rapid Capabilities and Critical Technologies division.

data.title: Job seekers are more active due to improved hiring environment. CompTIA survey reveals priorities influencing job search.
data.description: Job seekers are optimistic about a slight improvement in the hiring environment, despite lingering frustrations. A recent study reveals that job seekers in Downers Grove, Illinois, are actively pursuing new opportunities, with renewed energy and engagement. Conducted on July 17, 2025, the research highlights a positive outlook among job seekers, who are persevering through challenges to secure employment.

data.title: CI&T named as Digital Agency of Record for Volkswagen of America, supporting digital marketing and ecosystem with services like strategy, design and development. Volkswagen aims to enhance customer experience and empower dealers, employees in the U.S. market.
data.description: A global technology transformation specialist, CI&T (NYSE: CINT), has been chosen as the Digital Agency of Record (DAOR) for Volkswagen of America, Inc. This partnership will focus on improving Volkswagen's digital marketing and ownership ecosystem in the U.S., benefiting customers, dealers, and employees. CI&T's responsibilities include strategizing, designing, and developing digital solutions for Volkswagen.

data.title: Antenna Group launches Conscious Compass tool, powered by AI, to guide brands in moving from purpose to impact.
data.description: Antenna Group, a renowned global marketing and communications agency, has unveiled its latest innovation, the Conscious Compass. This proprietary, AI-driven tool is designed to evaluate brands and offer guidance to convert scattered efforts into a cohesive, purpose-oriented strategy. The Conscious Compass enhances Antenna's technological capabilities, enabling the agency to collaborate effectively with top brands that prioritize innovation and intentional, purpose-driven operations. This advancement underscores Antenna's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions for brands seeking to optimize their impact.

data.title: High-income Americans are planning to spend more amid market highs, while others are worried about housing and jobs. Optimism for rich consumers may boost consumer spending, but financial anxieties loom for medium and low-income households.
data.description: High-income earners are expected to drive consumer spending in the short term due to their optimism, while middle- and lower-income households are facing financial anxieties. A recent report from Boston on July 17, 2025 reveals that wealthier Americans are planning to boost spending, supported by the booming equity market. This contrasts with the concerns of medium- and lower-income families, hinting at a less positive long-term economic outlook.

data.title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp (FMCB) reports record Q2 2025 earnings: net income $23.1 million, EPS $32.94, ROA 1.65%, ROE 15.09%.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp reported a net income of $23.1 million, which was a 5.9% increase compared to the same quarter in 2024. The diluted earnings per share for the quarter were $32.94, reflecting a 12.1% increase from 2024. Key financial metrics include a return on average assets of 1.65% and a return on average equity of 15.09%. The company maintained a strong liquidity position with $291.8 million in cash and $1.3 billion in investment securities as of June 30, 2025. The efficiency ratio stood at 44.88%, showing continued cost discipline. The Company's regulatory capital ratios, such as the total risk-based capital ratio of 15.35%, indicated a strong capital position. Farmers & Merchants Bancorp has a history of dividend payments for 90 consecutive years and has increased dividends for 60 consecutive years. The company has been ranked by Sure Dividend and Bank Director Magazine for its exceptional performance in the banking sector.CEO Kent Steinwert emphasized the company's strong financial performance, highlighting record net income and robust balance sheet growth. Farmers & Merchants Bancorp's total assets increased to $5.5 billion from $5.4 billion as of December 31, 2024. Loans and leases outstanding were $3.6 billion, and the investment securities portfolio increased to $1.3 billion. Credit quality remained solid with no non-accrual loans and a negligible delinquency ratio. The company's forward-looking statements acknowledged various risks and uncertainties in the economic environment. Overall, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp demonstrated consistent growth and financial stability in the second quarter of 2025.

data.title: Globavend Holdings to undergo 1-for-200 reverse stock split, trading on Nasdaq expected to commence post-split on July 21, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Globavend Holdings Limited revealed its plans to implement a 1-for-200 reverse stock split of its ordinary shares. This move by the e-commerce logistics provider is aimed at enhancing its market position. Following the Reverse Stock Split, the company's ordinary shares are expected to commence trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market based on the adjusted value starting July 21, 2025. This strategic decision is anticipated to impact the company's standing and attract potential investors as it seeks to consolidate its share structure for improved trading dynamics.
